nodes.title: Create Agent
nodes.description: POST /api/agents with {branchName, worktreePath}. Creates new git branch, creates git worktree, starts tmux session, and launches AI agent. Returns {id, branchName, worktreePath, tmuxSession, status} on success. Returns 400 with {error: 'Branch already exists'} if branch exists.

nodes.title: List Agents
nodes.description: GET /api/agents. Returns array of {id, branchName, worktreePath, tmuxSession, status, createdAt, note} for all agents. Empty array if no agents exist.

nodes.title: Get Agent Status
nodes.description: GET /api/agents/:id/status. Returns {id, status, output, error, lastUpdated}. Status can be 'running', 'waiting', 'error', 'completed'. Returns 404 if agent not found.

nodes.title: Detect Agent Status
nodes.description: When polling agent tmux session. Parses output buffer to detect if agent is running, waiting for input, errored, or completed. Returns detected status string.

nodes.title: Delete Agent
nodes.description: DELETE /api/agents/:id. Kills tmux session, removes worktree (optional), deletes session file. Returns 204 on success. Returns 404 if agent not found.

nodes.title: Attach To Agent
nodes.description: When user presses Enter on agent. Attaches to tmux session for selected agent. User can interact with agent terminal. Detach with Ctrl+B then D.

nodes.title: Set Agent Note
nodes.description: PATCH /api/agents/:id/note with {note}. Updates custom note for agent. Returns updated agent object. Note is displayed in agent list.

nodes.title: Copy Agent Info
nodes.description: When user presses 'y' on agent. Copies agent name or branch name to clipboard. Shows 'Copied!' toast confirmation.
